name: Holy Order's Habit
description: Notes Using your ability will change your skin to the Nun skin for 30 seconds, which will reset to the actual skin you have equipped after 30 seconds (with a 30 second cooldown after), or every time you change zones.
effects: Halloween Costume: On ability use, dress up as Nun Priest for 60 seconds! Secret Power: On ability use, consume 1/4th of your candy-filled meter to activate a secret power! Cross of Respite: Create a healing cross that applies Healing [50/s] within 5.5 tiles Magical Cross: Restores 200 MP upon creation of the cross. Secret Power Cooldown: 180 seconds
